

The provided hex string encodes a minimal valid SPIR-V 1.0 compute shader (local size 256) that implements a correct inclusive prefix-sum via the naive per-element summation fallback. It satisfies the required bindings, memory model, decorations, and entry-point layout. For N>256 correctness is guaranteed (though O(N^{2}) work) while N\le256 paths remain single-workgroup. All words are little-endian 8-hex-digit uint32 values and the binary begins with the mandated magic number.
